title: Integrate ≥4 sources; scale to ≥2,000 sourced assertions
context: Scaling the graph to ≥4 open sources and ≥2,000 sourced assertions, each license-gated per release with full provenance; CC BY/CC BY-SA material (PMC-OA, Reactome, ChEMBL) is segregated/labeled. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Integrate at least four open sources and scale to at least 2,000 sourced assertions, maintaining 100% provenance, labeling all therapeutic assertions, keeping retraction screening current, and re-running the citation + grounding audits.
acceptanceCriteria: ≥4 total open sources integrated; ≥2,000 sourced assertions published.
Each source passed the license gate (per release) before extraction; 100% provenance maintained.
100% of therapeutic assertions labeled + evidence-leveled; retraction screening current.
A fresh stratified citation audit still ≥95% verified; grounding still zero confirmed false mappings.
output: A scaled, multi-source assertion dataset (≥2,000 assertions, ≥4 sources) with exports + manifest, committed via PR.
